lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Hello there, what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know, what can you do for me?

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Well, I am somewhat of an expert in the field of magical traps.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Magical traps? What does that have to do with the Historical Archive?

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: A good question. The Archive is actually part of the Tower of Magic, and was repurposed many decades ago.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Unfortunately, we don't possess full understanding of the Tower of Magic and its many enchantments, so we often discover remnants of traps.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: The task has fallen to me to investigate and study what we can of these enchantments in the hopes of understanding their magical power.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What exactly is the Tower of Magic?

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: The Tower of Magic is a uniquely enchanted building located just west of the library, though many levels and rooms are hidden from sight.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: I have dedicated my life to studying the powerful enchantments that conceal the many levels of the Tower, though it proves difficult at times.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the history of the Tower.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: The Tower was constructed by King Rada III. We don't know exactly when, since dates were not recorded before the Twill Accord.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Following the rebellion of the five houses against King Rada III, the Council of Elders was formed. They used the Tower as a meeting place for the Council.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Since then, it has mostly been used as a residence by the various rulers of the kingdom, with each ruler using the Tower however they saw fit.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Eventually, after Kourend Castle was built, ownership of the Tower was passed over to Lord Arceuus.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This room is part of the Tower?

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Indeed. During the invasion of the Wintertodt, it was feared that all of Kourend might be lost to the cold. In order to preserve the history of the kingdom, this archive was created during the fifth decade.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Unfortunately, as it is a former chamber of the Tower, and we do not fully understand the magic that conceals it, we often discover strange enchantments that we believe to be old traps.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Just recently we lost a scholar when she accidentally activated a portal and fell through it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Was she okay?

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Yes, she turned up a few days later, a little confused but physically fine. It happens every now and then, but most people turn up eventually.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess I'd better be careful then.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Just be cautious of walking into walls. Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Hello there, what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about King Shayzien VII.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: What do you wish to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to find out more about the expedition he ordered to Mount Quidamortem.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: I'm afraid I don't have any information on that expedition. You're probably better off talking to one of the others.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: I could tell you about the kings' work on the Tower of Magic though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well it's either this or buying rubbish at the Grand Exchange, fire away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well it's either this or running around telling everyone I'm an Ironman.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: During the time of King Shayzien VII, the Tower of Magic was the seat of power in Kourend. The king spent a lot of his time at the Tower, more than any other king.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: In fact, he oversaw the construction of various new sections, most notably the prison.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: When was this?

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Well now that I think about it, it was around the same time as the expedition you were asking about. I doubt the two are connected though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Would it be possible to visit the prison?

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Well the prison is abandoned and has been for many years so I suppose there's no harm in letting you see it.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Be aware that the magic in that part of the tower is a bit unstable so any items left in the prison will be lost. Would you like me to teleport you there now?

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: Very well, prepare yourself.

lines.speaker: Pagida
lines.text: I'll be here if you change your mind.
